METATRONS CUBE · SACRED GEOMETRY v3

HeadySystems is the operational backbone — HeadyConductor federated routing, HCFP auto-success remediation, 20-node orchestration, and real-time drift detection across 7 production domains.

Target Buyer

Platform architect / DevOps lead

Killer Workflow

"Show me all 20 nodes, their health, latency, and auto-fix any degraded services"

📊

20-Node Observatory

HeadyConductor routes across 20 AI nodes, 9 service groups, and 7 live domains — one pane of glass.

🔧

HCFP Auto-Success

The full-auto pipeline detects issues, proposes Arena-validated fixes, and applies them autonomously.

🛡️

PQC Security Mesh

SHA3-256 HMAC node handshakes, env validation on startup, and TruffleHog secret scanning in CI.

📈

Sacred Geometry Scaling

Fibonacci-spaced auto-scaling with golden ratio resource allocation across the service mesh.
